quotes: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.rule_text: Test contrast levels for every text/background pair to ensure they meet WCAG AA minimums (4.5:1 for body text and 3:1 for large text >=24px or 19px bold).

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.rule_text: Known-safe contrast pairs include Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, or Graphite text on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand backgrounds, and White text on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy. Avoid using Gold or Sunshine text on White. Golds are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning. Always pair color with other visual cues, such as icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
